info.name: ComplianceHub API Collection Copy
info.description: Postman collection to test all endpoints of the ComplianceHub API. Run the Login requests first to get JWT tokens.

item.name: ok- Get All Users - No Token (expect 403)
ok- Get All Users - Seller Token (expect 403)
ok- Get Users by Compliance Status (Agent)
ok- Get Users by Compliance Status - Seller (expect 403)
ok- Get User Profile by ID (Agent)
ok- Get User Profile by ID (Seller)

ok- Get Regulation by ID (Regulation Manager)
ok- Get Regulations by Marketplace (Regulation Manager)
ok- Get Compliance Document by ID (Agent)
ok- Get Compliance Documents by Status PENDING (Agent)
ok- Get Compliance Documents by Status APPROVED (Agent)
ok- Get Compliance Documents by Status REJECTED (Agent)

ok- Get Compliance Documents by Type BUSINESS_CERTIFICATE (Agent)

ok- Chatbot with Memory - First message (authenticated)
